valid: For the period 00:00 (UTC) on Tue 09 Jun 2026 to 00:00 (UTC) on Wed 10 Jun 2026
general_synopsis: Low west Iceland 991 moving slowly south, filling 997 by 1800 Tuesday. New low moving steadily northwest, expected Norwegian Basin 995 by same time
